_meta.purpose: Single source of truth for every official link and hotline Deshgori shows. NOTHING appears on the site unless it is in this file with a verified_on date. Re-verify monthly (see CLAUDE.md §5 linkcheck).
_meta.verified_by: web research against government sources (probashi.gov.bd, wewb.gov.bd, bangladesh.gov.bd, my.gov.sa, hrsd.gov.sa, imi.gov.my, embassy/consulate pages)
_meta.display_rule: Every tile must visibly print the official domain (সরকারি ঠিকানা) so users learn to read domains — this is the #1 anti-scam skill.
_meta.lookalike_warning: Documented fakes found during verification: amiprobashi.site / amiprabashi.com / amprobashi.com / smartprobashi.com (fake BMET-card sites), smartservices-icp-gov.com (fake UAE ICP), paid fake MDAC portals (real MDAC is FREE), dozens of unofficial 'qatar visa status' sites. Rule of thumb to teach users: বাংলাদেশ সরকারি সাইট শেষ হয় .gov.bd দিয়ে, সৌদি .gov.sa, আমিরাত .gov.ae, কাতার .gov.qa, মালয়েশিয়া .gov.my।

links.bn_desc: টোল ফ্রি, ২৪ ঘণ্টা — পরিবারও কল করতে পারে
links.note: Confirmed on ministry (probashi.gov.bd) call-center page and WEWB pages; third number 08000102030 also active.
Ministry call-center page lists this as the from-abroad number.
Listed on the national portal's official call-center list.

links.bn_desc: বেতন, পাসপোর্ট, নির্যাতনের অভিযোগ — বাংলায়ও চলে
links.note: Listed as HRSD contact on my.gov.sa service pages; prior card verification for Bangla support stands.

links.bn_desc: Agent List-এ নাম/RL নম্বর খুঁজুন — Active + মেয়াদ দেখুন
links.note: Prior ✅OFF verification; bmet.gov.bd also mirrors recruiting-agency lists.

links.bn_desc: ভিসা নম্বর + পাসপোর্ট নম্বর দিলেই আসল অবস্থা
গালফ যাত্রার মেডিকেল ফল নিজে দেখুন
সরকারি পোর্টালে অ্যাকাউন্ট খুলে আবেদন ও কার্ড
links.note: CRITICAL: Ami Probashi's government contract ended April 2025; the app is no longer the official channel. oc.bmet.gov.bd (account-based) is the government portal. Multiple lookalike 'probashi' domains exist — never link them.

links.bn_desc: ফেডারেল চেক ICP-তে; দুবাই ফাইল হলে GDRFA-তে
links.note: Official federal ICP portal; Dubai-issued visas via smart.gdrfad.gov.ae. Beware fake smartservices-icp-gov.com (dash domain).
Qatar MOI official portal; Metrash2 app is the official companion. Many unofficial 'visa status' sites exist — only this domain.

links.bn_desc: ই-ভিসা আসল কি না নিজে যাচাই করুন
links.note: Immigration Dept itself posted a notice naming this as the only official eVISA site. MDAC arrival card (imigresen-online.imi.gov.my/mdac) is FREE — fake sites charge up to $80.

links.bn_desc: সৌদিতে গৃহকর্মীর বৈধ চুক্তি এই প্ল্যাটফর্মেই হয়
links.note: KSA HRSD official platform (confirmed via my.gov.sa + hrsd.gov.sa). All domestic-worker contracts must run through Musaned; outside contracts are illegal. Worker gets a contract copy before departure; from Jan 2026 salaries flow electronically via Musaned WPS.

links.bn_desc: আবেদন ও স্ট্যাটাস চেক — Application ID + জন্মতারিখ
links.note: Status at /authorization/application-status; confirmed via DIP FAQ and embassy pages. Legacy MRP status: passport.gov.bd.
Confirmed via Bangladesh Police + multiple consulates + canada.ca. SMS status: PCC S <ref> to 26969.

links.bn_desc: সরকারি কোম্পানির মাধ্যমে কম খরচে বিদেশে চাকরি
links.note: BOESL = state-owned recruiter under the ministry; brms.boesl.gov.bd is the job application portal. The strongest legal alternative to দালাল.

links.bn_desc: বীমা, ক্ষতিপূরণ, মৃতদেহ আনয়ন, আইনি সহায়তা
links.note: WEWB services confirmed: legal aid via local admin, body repatriation, distressed women workers' rescue → safe home, ambulance, education certificates for migrants' children.
Ministry of Expatriates' Welfare and Overseas Employment.

links.bn_desc: রসিদ, চুক্তি, পাসপোর্ট-ভিসার কপি সাথে দিন
links.note: BMET online complaint portal, linked from district DEMO office pages and bmet.gov.bd. BMET hears both sides; mediation often recovers money. Ministry complaint cell can cancel licences/fine agencies.

Missions Abroad directory on mofa.gov.bd; every mission runs a <city>.mofa.gov.bd site. Labour-wing officer list (with phone/email per embassy) is published as a PDF on probashi.gov.bd — link it on the intent page.
